The horoscope of Louis Napoleon Ill of France furnishes anothet

He founded and wrecked the second Napoleonic empire. Uke the
preceding Charles V and Charles XII, 1\e was a dreamer, had imperial
ambitions for his county. but also had some good Intentions. After he
became Emperor on December 2. 1852. he got involved in sever-al
wars: tried to establish an empire in Mexico with his brother at the
helm, only to see him assa.ssinated: and was badly defeated by Persia in
